expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Manage workspace membership: invite, change roles, revoke access, audit log.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Invite member by email",
      "description": "As admin, invite a member by email so they receive onboarding link.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Invite endpoint validates email and creates pending member record",
        "Invite sends email with invite link",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/api/invites.py",
        "src/services/membership.py"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Change member role",
      "description": "As admin, change a member's role between viewer, editor, admin.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Role change endpoint updates role and enforces permissions",
        "Role change recorded in audit log",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/api/members.py",
        "src/services/permissions.py"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Revoke workspace access",
      "description": "As admin, revoke a member's access immediately.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Revoke endpoint disables access and invalidates sessions/tokens",
        "Revoke recorded in audit log",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/api/members.py",
        "src/services/session_manager.py"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Record membership changes in audit log and surface recent changes",
      "description": "As admin, see recent membership changes in workspace settings page with audit details.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Membership changes (invite, role change, revoke) are persisted in audit log",
        "Workspace settings page lists recent membership changes with timestamp and actor",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/services/audit.py",
        "src/ui/pages/workspaceSettings.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
